title: rubus × cataractarum
intro: Rubus × cataractarum, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus), resulting in a plant with unique characteristics and properties. The medicinal properties of Rubus × cataractarum include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and potential antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × cataractarum include its potential to support heart health, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant-rich protection against oxidative stress. Rubus × cataractarum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, making it a popular choice for those looking to incorporate its medicinal properties into their diet.
